titles.title: Captain of Israel's Host and Guide

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Captain of Israel's host and guide For all who seek the land above, Beneath thy shadow we abide, The cloud of thy protecting love;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our strength, thy grace; our rule, thy word; Our end, the glory of the Lord.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: As far from danger as from fear, While love, almighty love, is near.
